governingBody: Texas corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 313, 316 & 323.
note: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 313, 316 & 323 RAPE OF MINOR
